nodes.label: TiagoCameraConfig
nodes.rationale: The TIAGo Xtion configuration uses the Kinect interface type for compatibility with the existing RGB-D camera interface.

nodes.label: Preemption
nodes.rationale: Preemption supports reactivity by allowing a running perception task to be aborted when it is no longer relevant or must be replaced.

nodes.label: ConditionalSelector
nodes.rationale: The selector uses memory=False so cancellation is re-evaluated on every tick, preventing stale decisions and enabling an immediate response.

nodes.label: Invert Preempt Request
nodes.rationale: Inversion converts a cancellation check failure into success because a Selector stops at its first successful child.

nodes.label: Using RoboKudo within WSL
nodes.rationale: Windows is not a first-class supported platform, and the documented procedure was tested only with ROS 1.

nodes.label: VcXsrv Display Configuration
nodes.rationale: The bash environment sets software and indirect OpenGL flags plus DISPLAY so RoboKudo windows can be rendered through the Windows X server.

nodes.label: opencv-python
nodes.rationale: The WSL-specific OpenCV package is required to display and track the OpenCV window through the Weston or Windows display environment.
